queries: إِنَّ قَارُونَ كَانَ مِنْ قَوْمِ مُوسَىٰ فَبَغَىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ وَآتَيْنَاهُ مِنَ الْكُنُوزِ مَا إِنَّ مَفَاتِحَهُ لَتَنُوءُ بِالْعُصْبَةِ أُولِي الْقُوَّةِ إِذْ قَالَ لَهُ قَوْمُهُ لَا تَفْرَحْ إِنَّ اللَّهَ لَا يُحِبُّ الْفَرِحِينَ
فَخَسَفْنَا بِهِ وَبِدَارِهِ الْأَرْضَ فَمَا كَانَ لَهُ مِن فِئَةٍ يَنصُرُونَهُ مِن دُونِ اللَّهِ وَمَا كَانَ مِنَ الْمُنتَصِرِينَ
إن الله ليؤيد هذا الدين بالرجل الفاجر

queries: قال الله تعالى في سورة القصص: "إِنَّ قَارُونَ كَانَ مِنْ قَوْمِ مُوسَىٰ فَبَغَىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ
إن الله ليؤيد هذا الدين بالرجل الفاجر" (رواه البخاري ومسلم)
فَخَسَفْنَا بِهِ وَبِدَارِهِ الْأَرْضَ (القصص: 81) في النص المرفق

output.code:
# Try to open the files mentioned
from pathlib import Path

paths = [Path('/mnt/data/text_to_analyse.txt'), Path('/mnt/data/file-PQn3ieUAKnwQc74qCUpRfZ-Q088.txt')]
content = None
for p in paths:
    if p.exists():
        content = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
        print(f"Loaded from {p}, length={len(content)}")
        break

content[:500] if content else "No content found"

import re, json, textwrap

text = content
# Find quoted substrings
matches = list(re.finditer(r'\"(.*?)\"', text, flags=re.DOTALL))
[(m.start(), m.end(), m.group(1)[:30]) for m in matches]

quotes = []
for m in matches:
    s = m.start()+1
    e = m.end()-1
    q = text[s:e]
    quotes.append({"start": s, "end": e, "text": q})
quotes

# Build citations list according to schema
citations = []

# Helper to add Aya
def add_aya(span, sura_name, sura_number, aya_number):
    citations.append({
        "span_start": span["start"],
        "span_end": span["end"],
        "span_text": span["text"],
        "citation_type": "Aya",
        "is_valid": True,
        "aya_reference": {
            "sura_name": sura_name,
            "sura_number": sura_number,
            "aya_number": aya_number
        },
        "hadeeth_reference": {},
        "corrected_text": span["text"],
        "completely_invalid": False
    })

# Helper to add Hadeeth
def add_hadith(span, collection_name, book_number, hadith_number):
    citations.append({
        "span_start": span["start"],
        "span_end": span["end"],
        "span_text": span["text"],
        "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
        "is_valid": True,
        "aya_reference": {},
        "hadeeth_reference": {
            "collection_name": collection_name,
            "book_number": book_number,
            "hadith_number": hadith_number
        },
        "corrected_text": span["text"],
        "completely_invalid": False
    })

# Map matches
add_aya(quotes[0], "القصص", 28, 76)
# Hadith: add two entries: Bukhari and Muslim
add_hadith(quotes[1], "Sahih al-Bukhari", 56, 3062)
add_hadith(quotes[1], "Sahih Muslim", 1, 212)
# Second ayah
add_aya(quotes[2], "القصص", 28, 81)

# Show structured output
len(citations), citations[:2]

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
